name: Pronto's Phyllo-Wrapped White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tsp Grated orange or lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. While the white chocolate melts in a double boiler, use a mixer on low speed to blend the cream cheese, sugar, and orange or lemon rind until smooth. (Do not use low-fat cheese in this recipe) Beat in eggs one at a time, followed by cream and vanilla.
2. Add a small amount of the cheese mixture to the warmed white chocolate, then stir this mixture into the remaining cheese mixture.
3. Spoon the mixture into a buttered 9-inch layer cake pan lined with parchment paper. Set the pan in another pan, and pour hot water until it reaches halfway up the pan. Bake in a 350°F oven, adding more water if needed, until set and lightly browned on top, about 1 hour.
4. Remove from oven, let cool, and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
5. To serve, lightly brush each 8 - 12-inch square of phyllo pastry with melted butter. Gently remove each slice of cheesecake from the pan. Wrap a sheet of prepared phyllo pastry around each piece, folding until the cake is covered with three layers. Trim excess pastry.
6. Brush each dessert with additional melted butter. Place on a baking sheet and bake in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes, or until phyllo begins to brown. Transfer to dessert plates and decorate with fruit purees.
